name: Cheese Manicotti Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ricotta Cheese, or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chopped onions and mushrooms until tender.
2. Steam chopped spinach until wilted (or use thawed frozen spinach). Combine ricotta, mozzarella, 3/4 cup of Parmesan, eggs, parsley, spices. Add spinach and saute mixture to the above ingredients.
3. Fill uncooked manicotti shells; place filled shells in a single layer in a greased 13x9 baking pan. Add remaining sauteed vegetables to spaghetti sauce.
4. Cover manicotti with sauce. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
This is probably my favorite Italian dish.
